title: veronica agrestis subsp. opaca
intro: Veronica agrestis subsp. opaca, also known as the Wood Speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Veronica genus. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Veronica agrestis subsp. opaca include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
